rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Authorizing Retention Of Special Litigation Counsel With Authority To Proceed With Recovery Of Assets
rulings.Rulings: The motion for authorization of special litigation counsel is DENIED. The appeal of the Court's order appointing a personal administrator stays the relief sought, and the Court finds that under the relevant case law, Probabe Code Section 1310(b) does not apply. Should Evered Cohen wish to contest this ruling, he shall notify all parties and the court no later than 4:00 p.m. on 9/17/2014.
